role_leakage_notes.landscape: Leaked regulatory evidence (road markings) and meta evidence (utility pole style) into R2 reasoning.
role_leakage_notes.botanics: Leaked regulatory evidence (road markings) and meta evidence (utility pole style) into R2 reasoning.
role_leakage_notes.regulatory: Leaked landscape evidence (deciduous forest) and meta evidence (utility pole style) into R2 reasoning.
role_leakage_notes.meta: Leaked regulatory evidence (yellow center line) and landscape evidence (deciduous forest) into R2 reasoning.

landscape: The specific style of road markings (yellow center line, white edge line) is very common in northern and central Thailand.
botanics: The mix of tropical dry forest species and the specific structure of the deciduous canopy are highly characteristic of the highlands in Northern or Central Thailand.
regulatory: The combination of a yellow center line and white edge lines on a rural road is very common in Thailand.
meta: The guardrail design with the specific spacing of the vertical supports and the style of the concrete utility pole visible in the distance are highly characteristic of rural Thailand.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge's reasoning is fundamentally flawed and hallucinatory. It incorrectly asserts that Laos drives on the right (Laos is LHT) and Vietnam drives on the right (Vietnam is LHT). This error leads the judge to confidently eliminate the correct region (Indochina) and select Thailand, which is also incorrect (Ground Truth is Panama). The synthesis fails to consider the possibility of a non-Asian location despite the lack of linguistic evidence.
